feed.title: SAP Community - NW ABAP Remote Function Call (RFC)
feed.subtitle: NW ABAP Remote Function Call (RFC) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Connect through RFC destination from CF application: Hostname
entry.content:
Dear experts,

we have the case of a Docker container running in CF a ready-made app that connects via RFC to an SAP ECC/ S/4-System.

The challenge we are facing is: The virtual hostname provided by the cloud connector seems to be unresolvable by this application. Does anyone know if/ how a virtual hostname can be resolved (into an internal IP) by applications in CF?

Thanks!

entry.title: Getting Error in BAPI_INSPECTIONPLAN_CREATE
entry.content:
Am unable to create inspection plan through bapi "BAPI_INSPECTIONPLAN_CREATE" ,Although GROUP & GROUP COUNTER was generating but not creating/ updating into database table. and getting this error

1). "A CQCL 008 Inspection characteristic cannot be uniquely assigned to one operation".

Can any one please help me regarding this error.

Reference purpose i have given this screen shots , Any suggestions reward points will be there .

entry.title: RFC_READ_TABLE "OR"
entry.content:
Hello, please give me some advice. After the last update SAP, it does not return values if the OR function is used in the code and surrounded by brackets. How to write the function correctly or what function to use if we need to send two conditions to one field at the same time.

Example: TABLE MAST

FIELD: STLAN

We need the values "1" and "V" at the same time

Thank you

entry.title: SAP RFC SDK RfcGetFunctionDesc thread safe bug
entry.content:
Hi, All

I am working on a project in which I use SAP RFC SDK 7,50 patch 12

I am making calls to RfcGetFunctionDesc and all works well when the calls are sequentials,

When I call RfcGetFunctionDesc in parallels threads, only for the first call, I receive an error

Error Code: InvalidParameter

Error Group: ExternalRuntimeFailure

Key: RFC_INVALID_PARAMETER

Message: Index does not exist

If I make a first single call and then subsequent calls in parallel everything works.

From my own debugging and a series of tests, I think I have figured out that the problem is on using DDIC's cache when calling the function RfcGetFunctionDesc. I think I understood that it is due to the fact that on the first round when two threads access DDIC this is not thread safe. the error seems to indicate that the name of the function on the DDIC is initialized (first thread) but when the second thread tries to access with that name in the cache the item is not there and thus the error is returned "Index does not exist" probably because the first thread has not yet finished writing operations to the cache.

This problem with RfcGetFunctionDesc occurs only with functions that have parameter tables.

Has this ever happened to you?

How can i report this problem to the SAP RFC SDK development team?

entry.title: apsncencryption.dll is not a valid Win32 application
entry.content:
Hi All,

Need some help around integrating a .NET application with S4 HANA when SNC is activated. Our code uses SAP NCO X64. We installed SNCCLNTCRYPT00_3-80002731.

When we are trying to make a call to SAP S4, we are getting "apsncencryption.dll is not a valid Win32 application". We realize that instead of 64 bit, the application is calling 86 bit library. Here is the message .

LoadLibrary("C:\Program Files
(x86)\SAP\SNCEncryption\x86\sapsncencryption.dll")
Error 193 = "C:\Program Files
(x86)\SAP\SNCEncryption\x86\sapsncencryption.dll is not a
valid Win32 application."

Here is the complete log.

SAP.Middleware.Connector.RfcCommunicationException: '
LOCATION CPIC (TCP/IP) on local host with Unicode
ERROR SncPDLInit()==SNCERR_INIT
Unable to load GSS-API DLL
named "C:\Program Files
(x86)\SAP\SNCEncryption\x86\sapsncencryption.dll"
TIME Fri Oct 20 15:08:00 2023
RELEASE 720
COMPONENT SNC (Secure Network Communication)
VERSION 6
RC -1
MODULE sncxxdl.c
LINE 468
DETAIL LoadLibrary("C:\Program Files
(x86)\SAP\SNCEncryption\x86\sapsncencryption.dll")
Error 193 = "C:\Program Files
(x86)\SAP\SNCEncryption\x86\sapsncencryption.dll is not a
valid Win32 application."
SYSTEM CALL LoadLibrary
COUNT6

Any help is appreciated.

entry.title: purchase requisition line item text abap using create_text FM
entry.content:
How to create Purchase Requisition Line Item text using Create_text FM, i tried but that didn't work.

Thanks

entry.title: SAP RFC SDK. Connection closed after abap error in function
entry.content:
Hi, all

with RFC libraries I am calling an RFC Function on SAP that raises an error (via MESSAGE) when it cannot determine a result. This logic was implemented by the developer of the function and I cannot change it.

What I have noticed is that when this event occurs, the RFC connection I am using is silently removed and is no longer valid.

The return error is handled correctly in my programme and when it occurs I try to close the connection.

To do this I first use RfcIsConnectionHandleValid() to check if the connection is valid and then, for additional security, I use RfcPing() to check the connection before use RfcCloseConnection().

But

When I use RfcIsConnectionHandleValid() connection is returned to me as valid (but it is not) and when I call RfcPing() I receive

"RfcCommunicationException: Return Value: 19, Code: RFC_COMMUNICATION_FAILURE, Message:... no conversation found with id 60649920"

My program continues to work with subsequent calls because I handle the connection change, but a message is generated in the dev_rfc.log file. Since I make several thousand calls in a few minutes I find a huge file.

Why does an error MESSAGE in an ABAP Function close the connection of the RFC call in the libraries?

How can I check if the connection is valid before doing the RfcConnectionClose without generating text in the log file?

thanks in advance

entry.title: SAP RFC SDK. WSAEADDRINUSE: Address already in use after force close connection in Exception
entry.content:
Hi, all

I am executing a function for 300k calls in 10 parallel threads.

Some of these calls raise an exception and the connection is silently closed by SAP. In these cases my procedure calls RfcConnectionClose and opens a new one. If there are no errors the connection is put into a pool for reuse.

In my program the exceptions are over 20k and I have noticed that after a couple of minutes of execution I get this error.

I assume that when SAP silently closes the connection, the SDK libraries do not close the connection correctly, leaving the socket open and saturating the available ones.

maybe @ulrich.schmidt can help me. 🙂

(I can't open a ticket because I don't have permissions on SAP support.)

thanks for help

2023-12-05 15:51:24.901323 [14140] >> Error entry

[Handle: 3036668271408 ConvID: Target: SysID: SysNr: User: Codepage: 4103]

RfcCommunicationException: Return Value: 20, Code: RFC_COMMUNICATION_FAILURE, Message:

LOCATION CPIC (TCP/IP) on local host with Unicode

ERROR service '0' in use

TIME Tue Dec 05 15:51:24 2023

RELEASE 753

COMPONENT NI (network interface)

VERSION 40

RC -4

MODULE D:/depot/bas/753_REL/src/base/ni/nixxi.cpp

LINE 3454

DETAIL NiICheckPendConnection

SYSTEM CALL select, getsockopt

ERRNO 10048

ERRNO TEXT WSAEADDRINUSE: Address already in use

COUNTER 6264

entry.title: BAPI_DOCUMENT_CREATE2 .Net SAP Connector 3.1 attach files issue
entry.content:
Hi All,

I'm working on the migration a legacy project from 2.0 to the 3.1 .Net Connector.

Before we did upload files from the local PC by calling BAPI_DOCUMENT_CREATE2 function with additional parameter "USE_SAPGUI=2" which called SAPUI to do it. With .Net 3.1 SAP Connector when I call this function with this parameter it says:

The function module "SYSTEM_PREPARE_ATTACH_GUI" cannot be used for 'remote' calls.

Can you please advice what I can do with it? Can I set this module to support 'remote' calls or there is another way how to do it?

entry.title: DigiCert SSL certificate configuration for HTTP RFC connection
entry.content:
Hi,


If an application from ABAP ECC system RFC as the client side chooses a list of DigiCert certificates of multiple versions(including both older Root CA and newer G2 or G4 CA) as Standard SSL Client PSE,

i) how does RFC choose the certificate to pick?

ii) which version(older or latest version) of the same CA certificate is picked by RFC while establishing communication with the server-side hosted in SAP BTP Neo?

Could anyone please explain the concept and help me understand the priority mechanism of certificate cherrypicking by RFC when there are multiple versions of the same certificate?

This question is related to the recent deprecation of DigiCert Root CA which was replaced by DigiCert G2 by SAP for our internal product app-to-app flow testing.

Thanks,
BR,
Sayantan

entry.title: RFC BAPI_PBSRVAPS_GETDETAIL2 returning weird data
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm on ECC6 using a remote function call towards APO with the BAPI in subject, to get details about the planning book.

The returned key_figure_value table is however containing weird data, like these:

The PERIOD_BEGIN is really weird (Chinese characters?), PERIOD_END is empty (while it should not), and VALUE is initial, while I should have values here;

Do you have any clue why this is happening?

Any help and suggestion is really appreciated;

Thanks and bye,

Jepi

P.S.: testing the FM in APO with the same parameters is returning correct results and figures

entry.title: Can I access the BW Bridge Space from outside (e.g. from .NET or python) via RFC or HANA SQL?
entry.content:
Can I use the Service Key or HANA SQL Access to connect to the BW Bridge Space from outside?

If yes, how?

entry.title: need some help to create a task in abap
entry.content:
hello respected community my name is ruchir currently i m trainee of sap abap 

And I am creating a transaction  To Carry out Bin to Bin Transfer by Creating a WT -  

 

and i am I am very confused in finding a function modules ,classes and tables 

i can use for stock overview after entering handling unit number and then i will get all stock overview on form and then i can create

entry.title: Need reference fields BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFROMDAT2
entry.content:
Dear experts,

  I am using BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFROMDAT2  to create Sales Order. The SO has been creating successfully. However, certain fields are not getting added properly. I may be missing right elements to populate the data. 

I am looking for customer's purchase order reference field, Req.delivery date and plant. I tried with REF_1, PURCH_NO_C, REF_DOC for PO reference. But it's not working. For Req.delivery date and plant I am not able to find right fields.

Request to assist me in this.

Regards,

PD

entry.title: rfc/callback_security_method parameter
entry.content:
Hi,

After setting the parameter rfc/callback_security_method with Value 3, we have noticed few runtime dumps in our Development system. These runtime dumps corresponds to the RFC callback Rejection. 

To fix the issue we have maintained the RFC callback whitelist in SM59 for the particular RFC for which we got dumps.

We are expecting, similar dumps in UAT and production system for different other RFCs. 

Hence requesting your assistance to check how can we maintain called function module and callback function module for every RFC in order to avoid RFC callback rejections?

Thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Use EWM function /SCWM/OUTB_DLV_CHANGE2 to change fields from ERP to EWM?
entry.content: I need to change various fields in EWM after the delivery has been distributed. Can I use the RFC enabled function /SCWM/OUTB_DLV_CHANGE2 for this. Anyone who has tried this?

entry.title: SM58队列堵塞
entry.content: SM58中的队列堵塞了12000条，清理之后也无法自动执行

entry.title: Synchronous RFC call not receiving response data form PI/PO middleware
entry.content:
Hi Member's,

 I am able to send the data successfully to PI/PO system through RFC call  & from PI/PO system it is showing it has pushed the response data to ECC successfully . But in calling program I am not receiving any response instead the data which I am passing  through  RFC  (VATPOSTINGS ) is also getting cleared. 

  Request :RFC call from ECC =>  PI/PO => external system  (No issue , everything works as excepted )

  Response : external system => PI/PO => ECC ( Response from PI/PO not received  in calling program )

Not able to figure out for what reason I am not receiving the response, Please let me know if there is any thing I have to handle  additionally.

entry.title: RFC_CALL_TRANSACTION_USING
entry.content:
Hello together

Use case:
I call the module RFC_CALL_TRANSACTION_USING from my external application via RFC.
I would like to call the transaction "IE03" and display it in the GUI.
I also transfer the equipment no.

Result:
The GUI window opens in the transaction with the correct equipment

Problem:
The GUI window can no longer be closed until I close my external application.

Code:

public void CALLTRANSACTION(string TCode, string EQNr)
{

// Rufe die SAP Einstellungen auf
var sapDestination = sapConnector.GetDestination2();

// Funktionsbaustein aufrufen
var function_Transaction_Call = sapDestination.Repository.CreateFunction("RFC_CALL_TRANSACTION_USING");

// Setze die Parameter des Funktionsbausteins
function_Transaction_Call.SetValue("TCODE", TCode);
function_Transaction_Call.SetValue("MODE", "E");

// Struktur vorbereiten
var BT_DATA = function_Transaction_Call.GetTable("BT_DATA");

BT_DATA.Clear();
BT_DATA.Append();

BT_DATA.SetValue("PROGRAM", "SAPMIEQ0");
BT_DATA.SetValue("DYNPRO", "0100");
BT_DATA.SetValue("DYNBEGIN", "X");

BT_DATA.Append();

BT_DATA.SetValue("FNAM", "BDC_CURSOR");
BT_DATA.SetValue("FVAL", "RM63E-EQUNR");

BT_DATA.Append();

BT_DATA.SetValue("FNAM", "BDC_OKCODE");
BT_DATA.SetValue("FVAL", "/00");

BT_DATA.Append();

BT_DATA.SetValue("FNAM", "RM63E-EQUNR");
BT_DATA.SetValue("FVAL", EQNr);

function_Transaction_Call.Invoke(sapDestination);

}

entry.title: Update Exchange rate from BCE.
entry.content:
Starting from today (14/03/2024) when I download exchange rate from www.ecb.europa.eu:443  with report RFIMPNBS I receive this error message:

SSL handshake with www.ecb.europa.eu:443 failed:

SSSLERR_ALERT_HANDSHAKE_FAILURE (-122)#Peer aborted TLS handshake with fatal TLS handshake_failure(40).

All certificate in STRUST are correct.

Is something changed in www.ecb.europa.eu?

There are others SAP users with same problem?

 

Thanks

Alessandro
